name: WorkRamp LMS API
what_it_does: WorkRamp REST API for all-in-one LMS covering employee training, customer education, and partner enablement. Enables AI agents to manage learner accounts, enroll users in learning paths, track completions and certifications, and integrate WorkRamp training data into HRIS, CRM, and customer success workflows. WorkRamp targets revenue-focused teams with training that ties to business outcomes.
use_cases: Enrolling sales reps in onboarding programs from HR automation agents
Tracking customer onboarding training completions from CS workflow agents
Retrieving partner certification status from partner operations agents
Integrating WorkRamp learning data into HRIS and performance management agents
not_for: Academic education without corporate training focus
Large compliance-heavy regulated training (consider Cornerstone or Docebo)
best_when: A revenue-focused organization using WorkRamp wants AI agents to automate learning enrollment, track certifications, and connect training completion to CRM and customer success metrics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee and customer training records are personal data. Handle per employment law and customer data agreements.

auth.notes: WorkRamp API uses API key authentication. Enterprise access required. Contact WorkRamp for API integration setup.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing per learner; covers employee, customer, and partner learning
pricing.notes: Enterprise-focused LMS. Pricing varies by use case (employee/customer/partner). Contact WorkRamp sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee and customer training records are personal data
No public MCP server — enterprise API integration required
API documentation not publicly available — enterprise customers only
WorkRamp has separate modules for employee, customer, and partner training — understand which API access covers
US-only data residency — EU companies must assess compliance posture
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee, customer, and partner training data. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. Enterprise-only private documentation. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Multi-stakeholder training data (employees, customers, partners). SOC2, GDPR. API key auth.
